'''Fenson''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rendili/Legends|Rendili]] native who worked for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as an [[Imperial Navy Trooper/Legends|Imperial Navy trooper]] and was skilled at close-quarters combat. He worked with Trooper [[Vesden]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. When the [[Endor strike team/Legends|Endor strike team]] led by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] broke into the [[Endor shield generator bunker|shield generator bunker]] moments prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Hewex/Legends|Hewex]] and his men were temporarily taken captive, including Fenson and Vesden. Eventually, reinforcements arrived and Hewex and his men were out of captivity. During the end of the forest battle, Fenson was taken captive by the Rebellion prior to the bunker's destruction.<ref name="Customizable Card Game" /><ref name="ROTJ" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fenson first appeared as an unnamed Imperial navy trooper in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]. Although uncredited, he was portrayed by English actor [[Peter Allen]].<ref name="Autograph">''{{WebCite|url=https://planetdagobah.com/autographclassitrilogy.htm|text=Autograph Classic Trilogy|archivedate=20171115021856}}''</ref><ref name="Callsheet">As seen [[:File:TynanAnmdnul.png|here]], this production callsheet indefinitely confirms Peter Allen's appearance.</ref>
